title: Expressions, Control Flow, Iteration, Switches, and Deferred Work · Execution Trace: Operators Evaluation
summary: A retry policy must classify states, bound attempts, accumulate evidence, and guarantee cleanup across early returns. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go operators evaluation increment in a bounded retry and classification engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace arithmetic, comparison, logical, bitwise, shift, precedence, conversion, and evaluation-order guarantees from concrete values.
Use addresses, dereferencing, pointer parameters, escape-aware ownership, and Go 1.26 new(expression) optionals deliberately.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
